articles.content:

articles.title: 12 Americans injured in Iranian strike on Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia - Fox News
articles.description: 12 Americans were injured in an Iranian attack on Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, two of them seriously. Operation Epic Fury approaches fifth consecutive week.
articles.content:
Twelve U.S. service members were wounded in an Iranian missile and drone attack on a military base in Saudi Arabia, Fox News has confirmed.

articles.author: Kelly Tyko
articles.title: Trump's name is headed to dollar bills as cash use continues to decline - Axios
articles.description: President Trump's signature is set to appear on U.S. currency — a first for a sitting president — just as Americans are using cash less than ever.
articles.content:
Driving the news: The Treasury Department plans to put Trump's signature on all new U.S. paper currency, tied to the nation's 250th anniversary in 2026.
